name: Melffy Wally
name_jp: メルフィー・ワラビィ
desc: If your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s) (except during the Damage Step), or if an opponent's monster targets this card for an attack: You can return this card to the hand, then you can Special Summon 2 "Melffy" monsters from your Deck with different names from each other, except "Melffy Wally". During your End Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Melffy Wally" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s) (except during the Damage Step), or if an opponent's monster targets this card for an attack: You can return this card to the hand, then you can Special Summon 2 "Melffy" monsters from your Deck with different names from each other, except "Melffy Wally". During your End Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Melffy Wally" once per turn.
eff: If your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s) (except during the Damage Step), or if an opponent's monster targets this card for an attack: You can return this card to the hand, then you can Special Summon 2 "Melffy" monsters from your Deck with different names from each other, except "Melffy Wally". During your End Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Melffy Wally" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Activates if targeted for an attack
Returns itself from field to hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
